items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a persona onboards new staff with a corporate template. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or outcomes related to this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected result of the scenario behavior being supported or producing a failure report has been achieved. The lack of concrete evidence regarding the onboarding process leads to an inconclusive result.
